name: Cornmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine water, applesauce, egg beaters, sugar, and salt.
3. Mix in cornmeal, bread flour, and yeast until well combined.
4. Form dough into a loaf shape and place it on a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
6. Turn off the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
